shot_type_and_framing: close-up shot of several hands reaching for sweets on a round white marble tray with a golden stand, centered in the lower third of the 9:16 frame
camera_movement: slow push-in towards the tray and hands, emphasizing interaction
lens_and_cinematic_look: full-frame feel, shallow depth of field with sharp focus on sweets and hands, softly blurred background
environment_description: indoor setting with warm ambient lighting, soft cream-colored table surface beneath the tray, and blurred figures wearing traditional colorful clothing
subject_description: multiple hands delicately reaching for assorted bright orange round sweets and two yellow square sweets placed on a white marble tray with a gold pedestal
motion_behavior: gentle, natural hand movements reaching and picking sweets realistically
overall_cinematic_tone: grounded, intimate, premium, with a warm and soft filmic quality
